emails.subject: Invoice INV-NGO-4471 — PO-2025-00884
emails.body_text:
Hi,

Please find our invoice for the toner cartridge order below. This covers PO-2025-00884.

Invoice Number: INV-NGO-4471
Invoice Date: 2025-05-19
Vendor: Northgate Office Solutions, 78 Industrial Park Dr, Cincinnati OH 45201 (V-00229)
PO Number: PO-2025-00884
Description: Printer toner cartridges (Qty 20)
Unit Price: $101.50
Quantity: 20
Invoice Total: $2,030.00
Payment Terms: Net 30
Due Date: 2025-06-18

Please process at your earliest convenience. Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Janet Lowe
Accounts Receivable
Northgate Office Solutions
(513) 555-0198
jlowe@northgateoffice.com
